claim_results.claim: Uncertainty: The supplemental evidence is referenced but not presented in the excerpt.
Death becomes possible because decay becomes possible because entropy has entered the equation.
And because his authority was federal — the collapse propagated instantaneously to all entangled observers.
Uncertainty: Interpretation of the verse as physical evidence is speculative.

No equation currently relates Informational Fidelity values to collapse thresholds. conf 0.90 > What we don't have is the equation that takes "this observer received the specification directly, this one received it degraded" and outputs "this measurement triggers collapse, this one doesn't." That equation doesn't exist yet.
If the mapping holds across independent domains the universality claim gains credibility. conf 0.80 > If the mapping holds in two independent domains, the universality claim becomes serious.
